hero.description:
Full-stack developer crafting web experiences with modern technologies.
I build things that live on the internet.

passions.title: Passions
passions.intro: There's more to me than just code. Here are some of the things that drive me outside of work.

skating.title: Skateboarding
skating.text: Skating has been a part of my life for years. It taught me persistence, creativity, and how to get back up after a fall — lessons that carry straight into writing code.

learning.title: Always Exploring
learning.text: Whether it's diving into a new framework, exploring a new city, or picking up a random skill — I'm always curious. I believe the best developers are the ones who never stop learning.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? Drop me a message.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.description: A collection of things I've built, from full-stack apps to frontend challenges.

blogPage.title: Blog
blogPage.description: Thoughts on web development, projects, and things I learn along the way.
